goal: Finish the remaining Claude-owned Apex workspace work without redoing Codex estate cleanup or touching secret-bearing files.

must_pull_first.reason: Codex pushed WO-APEX-ESTATE-CLEANUP-004 cleanup through Phase F runbook. Claude must work on top of that state.

do_not_redo: WO-APEX-ESTATE-CLEANUP-004 Phases A, B, C, D, E
known_remaining_blockers: active_projects/bermcoin/.env is ignored and untracked but contains real secrets; do not read, print, move, delete, stage, or rewrite history without explicit operator approval.
Legacy cloud/API muscles remain unapproved until live credential-backed tests are available.
Unregistered audit/spec artifacts need separate governance triage.

required_gate.when: before repo edits, fallback continuation, staging, or promotion
required_gate.note: Use --allow-dirty only after inspecting existing local changes.

primary_batch.name: doc-controller and repo-menu review
actions: Review diffs against HEAD and decide whether each change is still valid.
If valid, update or regenerate repo menu artifacts consistently.
Run syntax and generation/validation commands available in the repo.
Commit this batch separately from governance/spec/audit material.

secondary_batch.name: SP-A and incident work-order governance triage
actions: Classify as active, superseded, archive, or merge candidate.
Do not mix this batch with doc_controller or repo-menu commits.
If unsure, produce a triage report and hand a bounded implementation packet to Codex.

evidence_batch.name: audit evidence classification
actions: Keep only evidence tied to a committed work order or certificate.
Do not commit raw noisy audit output unless linked from a work order.
Do not commit receipt/OCR raw material without sensitive-data review.

acceptance_criteria: Claude pulls/pivots onto branch state at or after 4c6a285.
No Codex estate cleanup commits are reverted or duplicated.
No secret-bearing file is read, printed, staged, moved, deleted, or committed.
Each batch is committed separately with a clear message.
Before each commit, Claude runs the Apex work gate and relevant validation.
If blocked, Claude writes a Blocker Report with exact file paths, blocker reason, lowest-friction resolution, and whether Codex should receive a bridge packet.

when_to_send_to_codex: Python code changes in docs/doc_controller.py need implementation or repair.
Generated repo menu output is inconsistent with generator behavior.
A validation command fails and the safe fix is code/config, not governance wording.
Claude needs an independent review before signoff.

operator_note: This packet is complete. If Claude Code cannot see current state automatically, tell Claude: pull origin/apex/estate-seed-00004 and read docs/APEX_ACTIVE_QUEUE.md before opening any older work order.
